CLI

Everything you need to run Marque from terminal.

Tip:
Run commands from your site's folder unless the example says otherwise.

Command reference

marque build

sh
marque build . # builds static output into dist/
  • Description: Build static files into dist/.
  • Arguments:
    • site-dir:[dir]

marque help

sh
marque help # shows all available commands and usage
  • Description: Show command help.
  • Arguments: none

marque new

sh
marque new my-site # creates a new site copying the template
  • Description: Create a new project scaffold.
  • Arguments:
    • layout:[name]
    • theme:[name]
    • site-dir:[dir]

marque serve

sh
marque serve . # serves the website on default :3000 port
  • Description: Start local dev server with live reload.
  • Arguments:
    • site-dir:[dir]
    • port:[number] (optional)

Examples

  1. Create project, serve it and build it

    sh
    marque new my-site layout:sidebar theme:default
cd my-site
marque serve my-site 4000
marque build my-site

  2. New project

    sh
    marque new docs-site layout:sidebar theme:default
cd docs-site

  3. Develop locally

    sh
    marque serve .

    Open http://localhost:3000

  4. Production build

    sh
    marque build .

    Deploy the dist folder to your host.

Troubleshooting

Command not found

  • Check Node.js version.
  • Re-run npm link from the marque repository.

Slow watch or file locks on Windows

  • Keep workflow in one environment (PowerShell/CMD or WSL).
  • Avoid mixing WSL on Windows-mounted folders.

Route 404 while working

  • Confirm page is listed in summary.mq.
  • Use the 404 create-page button for missing pages.
